raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The section contains a gap statement (post-hoc merging assumption) and a contribution claim ('first per-commit routing benchmark'); coherence and completeness of that framing is central to any section review.","R1.2":"Paragraph 2 is saturated with stacked hedges ('tentatively surveyed', 'broadly speaking', 'It seems reasonable to suppose', 'might, in principle', 'presumably depend on') while paragraph 4 asserts precise quantitative results; the tonal and logical tension between these passages must be assessed.","R1.3":"The 78%-recall / 31%-cost claims are the section's main empirical anchors; verifying that they are properly attributed to the experiments described and not overclaimed relative to what is actually shown is a core review obligation.","R1.4":"'First per-commit routing benchmark' is a strong novelty claim that must be evaluated against the prior work enumerated in paragraph 2 (SARIF pipelines, differential analyzers, cost-model scheduling); whether the delta is adequately distinguished is reviewable.","R1.5":"The contribution paragraph is buried at the end of the section rather than foregrounded; reviewing whether the narrative arc (motivation → gap → contribution) is optimally ordered is directly in scope.","R1.6":"Paragraph 2 exhibits notably weak prose—passive constructions, vague quantifiers ('roughly thirty'), and redundant hedging chains—that undercut the section's authority and warrant targeted writing feedback."},"clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":""}

rationale.R1.1: The section contains a gap statement (post-hoc merging assumption) and a contribution claim ('first per-commit routing benchmark'); coherence and completeness of that framing is central to any section review.
rationale.R1.2: Paragraph 2 is saturated with stacked hedges ('tentatively surveyed', 'broadly speaking', 'It seems reasonable to suppose', 'might, in principle', 'presumably depend on') while paragraph 4 asserts precise quantitative results; the tonal and logical tension between these passages must be assessed.
rationale.R1.3: The 78%-recall / 31%-cost claims are the section's main empirical anchors; verifying that they are properly attributed to the experiments described and not overclaimed relative to what is actually shown is a core review obligation.
rationale.R1.4: 'First per-commit routing benchmark' is a strong novelty claim that must be evaluated against the prior work enumerated in paragraph 2 (SARIF pipelines, differential analyzers, cost-model scheduling); whether the delta is adequately distinguished is reviewable.
rationale.R1.5: The contribution paragraph is buried at the end of the section rather than foregrounded; reviewing whether the narrative arc (motivation → gap → contribution) is optimally ordered is directly in scope.
rationale.R1.6: Paragraph 2 exhibits notably weak prose—passive constructions, vague quantifiers ('roughly thirty'), and redundant hedging chains—that undercut the section's authority and warrant targeted writing feedback.
